title: Colgate Advanced Whitening 100ml
description: Product Description Colgate Advanced Whitening 100ml Directions Apply a pea-sized amount to a toothbrush, brush in circular motions for two minutes, and rinse thoroughly. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. Avoid ingestion. If large amounts are swallowed, seek medical help. Manufacturer Contact Information Colgate Advanced Whitening 100ml See more
